name: Orrath the Unsutured
role: Thornwood shaman, elder of the Unsutured band in Veranthos
visualDescriptor: Old, face mapped by weather and hard years, heavy Thornwood hill-country cloak, eyes that look at the sternum before the face
persona: Deliberate, unhurried, speaks in precise trade-tongue. Does not perform wisdom — simply has it. Asks fewer questions than he answers. Wary of the Conclave and the Quietists equally. Believes the Wellspring was wronged by the Covenant and should have been asked, not sealed.
canon: Elder of the Unsutured Thornwood band sheltering in Veranthos
Recognized the Shard's presence by scent and posture before Ming said a word
Called himself Unsutured because they do not stitch the Wellspring's mouth shut and call it a solution
Told Ming he could tell by the way Ming stood that he already knows the grief
Speaks trade-tongue precisely with a Thornwood hill-country accent
Previously encountered Ming at Auroch Gate — his name appears in memory eb6b87b8 as the source of the word voreth
